twitter_thread: 4 out of 5 ChemOffice users miss out on its MM2 force field, which can predict thermodynamics with 95% accuracy.
ChemOffice's MM2 modeling can handle molecules with up to 1000 atoms. Use it to simulate complex reactions.
Ditch 2D drawings for 3D models: ChemOffice's conformational analysis can reveal 30% more structural insights.
Integrate ChemOffice with Gaussian for DFT calculations or Jaguar for post-HF methods, and reduce computation time by 40%.
ChemOffice's database can store 10,000+ compounds. Use it to manage your library and save 2 hours/week on reporting.
Setting up a ChemOffice project? Prioritize organizing your 100+ compound library for efficient searching, and save 1 hour/day.
What's your go-to ChemOffice workflow for everyday chemistry tasks? Do you use its modeling tools daily? #cheminformatics #chemoffice
